items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the exploratory step.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where a persona accidentally posts data to the wrong business. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific outcomes or behaviors related to this scenario, nor does it confirm whether the system supports such a situation. The lack of concrete evidence regarding the expected result leads to an inconclusive status for this exploratory step.
